sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70083" key="nekrobo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεκρο-βόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n70083.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">corpse-devouring,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cyran.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
